instruction: The black underline should not be muted red. Restore its proper color on the no symbol icon.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/no-symbol.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M18.364 18.364A9 9 0 0 0 5.636 5.636m12.728 12.728A9 9 0 0 1 5.636 5.636m12.728 12.728L5.636 5.636"/></g>
  <line id="underline" stroke="#d33036" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="116" x2="112" y2="116" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/no-symbol.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M18.364 18.364A9 9 0 0 0 5.636 5.636m12.728 12.728A9 9 0 0 1 5.636 5.636m12.728 12.728L5.636 5.636"/></g>
  <line id="underline" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="116" x2="112" y2="116" />
</svg>
